induction_input: The book the student read collapsed.

induced_prompt_raw: Generate simple sentences containing exactly one subject-relative clause (e.g., "The [noun1] the [noun2] [verb2] [verb1]"), avoiding double-nested or center-embedded clauses (like "the N the N the N V V V").
